description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (test and release) using the docker:stable Docker image and the docker:stable-dind service for every job, and set the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay2. In the test stage add a job named test that runs the commands: apk add --no-cache jq and ./test.sh. In the release stage add a job named release-latest that runs only on the master branch and executes: echo "Building Docker image...", docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" ., echo "Logging to GitLab Container Registry with CI credentials...", docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" "$CI_REGISTRY", echo "Pushing to GitLab Container Registry...", docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest". Also add a job named release-version that runs only on tags matching the regex ^\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-gitlab\.\d+)?$ and executes: echo "Building Docker image...", docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" ., echo "Logging to GitLab Container Registry with CI credentials...", docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" "$CI_REGISTRY", echo "Pushing to GitLab Container Registry...", docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME".
